title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.291 - Applicability and inapplicability
text:
376.291.  Applicability and inapplicability. — Sections 376.291 to 376.307 shall apply only to investments and investment practices of domestic insurers organized under the provisions of this chapter.  Sections 376.291 to 376.307 shall not apply to separate accounts of an insurer except to the extent that the provisions of section 376.309 so provide.
(L. 2007 S.B. 66)
